item.dc:creator: satsukeshi

item.title: If you make a nostril sound you have to hit the green arrow thingy meme dump
item.description:
1. "F your shoes in particular" - CAT
2. That's some damn fine lawyer-ing
3
4. Economy Class? In this economy?!
5
6. Now we've done it!
7
8. Skaters gonna skate
9. Me in a fight
10
11
12
13
14
15. And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" . If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too. It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I hope this email finds you well.
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: Fix it. Become aware of your words.
item.description: A fantastic post by Joe Becigneul. Very eloquent and thought provoking, he’s absolutely correct. I knew she has a great foundation (and the humanitarian work she does), but her history, I had no idea. Talk about a good model for our children (ladies, everyone, etc) and that’s hard to find these days. Maybe Zuckerberg, or Musk (etc.) could take a page or two from her book and learn a thing or two but alas good luck with that. It takes humility but that’s a rabbit hole for another day. Like Joe in the post above says; Fix it. Become aware of your words. We need this healthy train of thought now more than ever as we all slowly move into the next American presidential election. It’ll take a herculean effort trying to avoid the current toxic onslaught and it’s going to get amped up as we roll through the year. Please remember to hydrate and check in on a neighbor (or two). Please be safe out there.
item.dc:creator: DrDeadReckoningExtraordinaire

item.dc:creator: gryzlock

item.title: How can you laugh at suffering?
item.description: I'm not talking about old 3 stooges slapstick comedy or wile coyote. I mean the real videos of people doing backflips and landing on their head, running full speed into something, or crashing on skateboards/bikes/etc. I'm here for interesting posts and funny memes, lets leave the sociopathic sadism to 4chan.
item.dc:creator: techwizard

item.title: I gotta do more research on Jimmy Carter
item.dc:creator: samresse2101

item.title: Red flag after red flag after red flag!
item.description: Someone explain why in the hell did a hiring manager want to interview me 4 separate times? Also why was he late for every interview? Just so many red flags with this company... They said they're fast paced and want me to get stuff that takes 3 months done in 3 days. RED FLAG! The money would have been really good, but not good enough to ruin my mental health.
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: Star Trek: Voyager (1995 to 2001) - Behind the Scenes
item.description:
TOS - https://imgur.com/gallery/4SPJxyX TNG - https://imgur.com/gallery/CMgsCIy DS9 - https://imgur.com/gallery/S8ISUlZ
You've captured their STUNT DOUBLES!
That'd be asshole Rick Berman in the headlock
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Please help in Denver area
item.description: My niece is missing and I live half a country away. Thanks everyone. I appreciate you all. Also connected to the Parker area. Use these numbers, don't report sightings in the comments. Thank you. CBI missing persons (303) 239-4649 DPD non-emergengy line (720) 913-2000
item.dc:creator: HeyILikeDogs

item.title: If you are unwilling to do your job, you can't get re-elected to that job.
item.description: tl;dr Ten R state legislators cannot run in Oregon - they walked out for six weeks and violated a constitutional amendment designed to stop walkouts Source: https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2024/02/01/oregon-supreme-court-10-senators-reelection/
item.dc:creator: WebDragonG3
